summary: Completed testing of iteration 7 features: Admin Steps tab step reordering with up/down arrows and Admin User detail dialog with profile image preview. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Step order numbers maintained correctly after reorder
Admin Steps tab displays up/down arrow buttons on left side
First step up arrow correctly disabled
Last step down arrow correctly disabled
Step reordering via arrow clicks works correctly
Admin Users tab displays View buttons
User info (Name, Email, Role, Created) shown beside profile image
All admin tabs (Analytics, Users, Steps, Partners, CMS, Audit) functional
